caption: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a dark blazer over a dark dress, sits in a chair and looks down while reading an open book. The scene is split vertically, with a dark blue panel on the left containing white and light blue text and a brightly lit room on the right. The text on the left reads, "When I found out about this program -- the combination of the fellowship, the masters in economics, and the faculty whose work I was already familiar with -- I was really excited about the opportunity to study under them." Below this, it says "— Kristine". Certain words, including "fellowship", "masters in economics", "faculty", and "really excited", are highlighted in a light blue color. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, slightly shifting the book in her hands as she continues reading.
